title: ozanonia freynii
intro: Ozanonia freynii, also known as the Turkish angelica or wild angelica, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Ozanonia freynii include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments, or it can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
